items.title: Irish government to contribute £197m to cross-border rail services
items.dek: The money will come from the last allocation from the Irish government's Shared Island Fund.
items.body: The money will come from the last allocation from the Irish government's Shared Island Fund.

items.title: Zambia ex-president's family wins latest legal battle over what should happen to his body
items.dek: Edgar Lungu's family and the Zambian government remain in dispute 12 months after he died.
